label: Knowledge editing & memory consolidation

node.label: Knowledge editing & memory consolidation
node.definition: Knowledge editing changes selected factual or behavioral associations in parameters or external memory while attempting to preserve unrelated capabilities.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, Knowledge editing & memory consolidation is modeled as depending on Parametric memory, Continual learning & test-time adaptation pipelines and feeding downstream nodes such as Memory lifecycle, forgetting & consolidation.
examples: atlas downstream link to Memory lifecycle, forgetting & consolidation
limitations: Stored or retrieved information can be stale, private, contradictory, inaccessible, or incorrectly ranked at the moment it is needed. Its direct dependencies include Parametric memory, Continual learning & test-time adaptation pipelines.

dependencies.rationale: In this atlas graph, Knowledge editing & memory consolidation has a `retrieves_from` dependency on Parametric memory with `core` strength.

In this atlas graph, Knowledge editing & memory consolidation has a `uses` dependency on Continual learning & test-time adaptation pipelines because Continual learning & test-time adaptation pipelines is modeled as a reusable ingredient for the node.
In this atlas graph, Knowledge editing & memory consolidation has a `uses` dependency on Causal inference because Causal inference is modeled as a reusable ingredient for the node.
